creator: k5@cheerful.com
text:
Fixing "X manpage" errors with XFree86-4 described at
	http://bento.freebsd.org/errorlogs/4-full/.

	35 ports are fixed:
	audio/wmcdplay, audio/wsoundprefs, audio/xmix,
	deskutils/wmpinboard,
	emulators/xsystem35, 
	games/awele, games/mindfocus, games/speyes, games/sxsame,
	games/xbloody, games/xchomp, games/xeyesplus, games/xinfocom,
	games/xmj, games/xpuyo,	games/xscavenger, games/xsoldier,
	graphics/plotmtv, graphics/xfpovray, graphics/xpx,
	mail/ml, mail/youbin,
	misc/xquote,
	net/vnc,
	sysutils/wmmount, sysutils/xloadface,
	www/wmnetselect,
	x11-clocks/mlclock, x11-clocks/wmdate, x11-clocks/wmtime,
	x11-wm/lwm,
	x11/kb2mb2, x11/tycoon, x11/xfedor, x11/xfishtank

	2 ports are still broken; I didn't try them at this time.
	audio/wsoundprefs, cad/pcb

Fix: attached tarball includes patches for each port. Most of them
	are simply fixing porblem but some are also include feature
	enhancement.

	audio/xmix: split patch-aa into patch-a[ab].
	games/awele: respect CC.
	graphics/plotmtv: respect CFLAGS. <malloc.h> -> <stdlib.h>
	net/vnc: respect CC, CFLAGS.
	mail/youbin: DOCDIR which conflists with X11 -> YOUBIN_DOCDIR.
		comment PREFIX?=${LOCALBASE}. I believe maintainer
		knows cleaner way to do with this port.
	x11-clocks.mlclock: avoid forcing to link against -lxpg4.
		FreeBSD.cf knows how to handle with this now.

ADDED FILES:

	audio/wmcdplay: patch-ab.
	audio/xmix: patch-ab.
	deskutils/wmpinboard: patch-ac.
	games/mindfocus: patch-ac.
	games/xbloody: patch-aa.
	games/xinfocom: patch-aa.
	games/xmj: patch-aa.
	games/xpuyo: patch-aa.
	games.xscavenger: patch-aa.
	graphics/plotmtv: patch-ac, patch-ad.
	graphics/xpx: patch-aa.
	mail/ml: patch-ag.
	net/vnc: patch-ae, patch-af, patch-ag.
	www.wmnetselect: patch-aa.
	x11-clocks.wmdate: patch-aa.
	x11-clocks.wmtime: patch-ab.
	x11-wm.lwm: patch-aa.
	x11.kb2mb2: patch-aa.
How-To-Repeat: 
$ w3m -dump http://bento.freebsd.org/errorlogs/4-full/ |grep 'X manpage'
